# RC-01: Risk Classification

**Track:** Risk Controls (`RC`) · **Priority:** MUST (mandatory) · **Status:** draft

Classify the non-functional risk exposure of the change. The resulting risk tier determines governance intensity for all subsequent stages: which controls require enhanced scrutiny, what approval authority is needed, and what testing depth is required.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 1 | Intent Ingestion | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent classifies, human validates |
| **Agent does** | Apply risk classification criteria to classify risk tier (low/medium/high/critical) and determine governance intensity. |
| **Human does** | Validate classification; escalate if classification appears inconsistent with known system context. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| Validated feature specification | QC-01 | Complete specification with NFRs, used as input to the risk classification. |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Risk classification | decision | Risk tier (low/medium/high/critical), governance intensity, and rationale. | 7 years (DORA) |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_change |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | escalate |
| **Escalate to** | Risk Officer |

If classification cannot be determined, escalate to Risk Officer for manual assessment.

## Dependencies

- `QC-01`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 8(1) | Proportionate ICT risk management requires risk classification before change proceeds |
| EU AI Act | Art. 9(2) | Risk management must be applied proportionately throughout the AI system lifecycle |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Risk Management · **Owner role:** Risk Officer
